subsystems.name: truth/genealogy/source ingestion
subsystems.why: Temporal filtering and source applicability enforcement are present and stable.
subsystems.residualRisk: Coverage remains mostly service-level rather than end-to-end scenario-heavy.

subsystems.name: world-state chronology
subsystems.why: Dedicated chronology verification command exists and passed.
subsystems.residualRisk: Future chronology schema changes may need additional edge fixtures.

subsystems.name: epic spine / book mapping
subsystems.why: Dedicated epic mapping verification command exists and passed.
subsystems.residualRisk: Operational risk is mainly future content-data calibration, not current logic stability.

subsystems.name: scene generation
subsystems.why: Build and strict full-system verification pass with deterministic generation governance retained.
subsystems.residualRisk: Model/provider behavior drift remains external and monitored via resilience controls.

subsystems.name: repair/revision/job execution
subsystems.why: Verification umbrella includes quality/reentry checks and strict certification passes.
subsystems.residualRisk: Long-run queue pressure scenarios are not fully simulated in this certification run.

subsystems.name: cognition / knowledge boundary
subsystems.why: Truth-boundary and contract surfaces remain enforced and green.
subsystems.residualRisk: Boundary integrity still depends on explicit write-boundary adoption discipline.

subsystems.name: reader memory / relationship progression
subsystems.why: Reader-memory writeback and interaction harness flows pass under strict run.
subsystems.residualRisk: Policy remains intentionally conservative and could need expansion with future product scope.

subsystems.name: emotional continuity / drift
subsystems.why: Continuity is integrated across cockpit/observability and strict full-system checks passed.
subsystems.residualRisk: No dedicated stress suite for very long sessions in this run.

subsystems.name: session/turn/re-entry
subsystems.why: Deterministic interaction harness and strict prelaunch/full-system both pass.
subsystems.residualRisk: Low; mainly dependent on migration discipline staying enforced.

subsystems.name: response generation / guardrails
subsystems.why: Guardrail and response flows continue passing in strict umbrella execution.
subsystems.residualRisk: Provider/model-side policy adversarial variance remains a monitoring concern.

subsystems.name: voice presentation / synthesis
subsystems.why: Voice-related contract/presentation paths remain green and bounded by policy.
subsystems.residualRisk: Provider-specific runtime differences can still affect synthesis quality.

subsystems.name: cockpit backend / UI
subsystems.why: Cockpit payload and command verification both pass; degraded handling was tightened in prior chunk.
subsystems.residualRisk: Orchestration ownership density remains high in one service.

subsystems.name: entitlements / balances / unit economy
subsystems.why: Strict run confirms no degraded debit leakage and harness accounting remains coherent.
subsystems.residualRisk: Economic policy tuning thresholds may require future calibration.

subsystems.name: degraded mode / provider resilience
subsystems.why: Dedicated degraded/resilience/moderation verify commands pass; fallback classification is explicit.
subsystems.residualRisk: Policy remains intentionally narrow and should evolve cautiously with traffic patterns.

subsystems.name: observability / analytics
subsystems.why: Observability payloads remain contract-validated and integrated in full-system checks.
subsystems.residualRisk: Some observability substructures still rely on partially loose schema zones.

subsystems.name: author/God mode
subsystems.why: Authorial inspection remains role-gated and contract-governed.
subsystems.residualRisk: Separation relies on maintaining strict mode boundary discipline as features grow.

subsystems.name: contracts / registries / validation
subsystems.why: Contracts, drift, and strict certification consistency all pass with expanded coverage.
subsystems.residualRisk: Remaining loose nested schema segments are known and documented.

subsystems.name: migrations / operational dependencies
subsystems.why: Migration readiness command and strict certification run pass.
subsystems.residualRisk: Prisma config deprecation warning is non-blocking but should be modernized.

subsystems.name: permissions / moderation
subsystems.why: Moderation verification passes and degraded/fallback routing remains explicit.
subsystems.residualRisk: Heuristic moderation patterns remain intentionally lightweight.

subsystems.name: performance / background work
subsystems.why: Background maintenance command passes in final run.
subsystems.residualRisk: No high-volume performance soak evidence in this certification pass.

subsystems.name: test harnesses / verification scripts
subsystems.why: Full matrix (22 commands) passed including strict prelaunch/full-system and deterministic harness.
subsystems.residualRisk: Umbrella script scope still depends on maintainers keeping command list aligned with critical surfaces.
